column1: I'll never forget my first day at work. It was______________a disaster that I lost my job!
The boss explained what I had to do, but she did it_____________quickly that I didn't understand.
I wasn't brave_______________to ask her to repeat it, so I pretended I knew what to do.
I was_____________busy that I started making more and more mistakes.
I made_____________a lot of mistakes that the other workers noticed.
They tried to help me, but it was______________late.
I just had_____________much do that I gave up.
The boss came back and she was_______________shocked that she fired me immediately! My first day was also my last!
